ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_CAPTURE_LANTERN.title: Soulcapture Lantern
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_CAPTURE_LANTERN.descripti: At the start of each combat, add a temporary [gold]Soul Capture[/gold] to your [gold]draw pile[/gold].
ABSTS2MOD-SOUL_CAPTURE_LANTERN.flavor: Its flame reflects souls that have only just scattered.
ABSTS2MOD-INNATE_SOUL_SEAL.title: Innate Soul Seal
ABSTS2MOD-INNATE_SOUL_SEAL.description: At the start of each combat, add a random monster card to your [gold]hand[/gold]. Its cost becomes [blue]0[/blue] this combat.
ABSTS2MOD-INNATE_SOUL_SEAL.flavor: An old seal that calls the most useful soul at battle's first breath.
